channel.title: Budgeting on DotKsp Writings
channel.description: Recent content in Budgeting on DotKsp Writings

item.title: I Decorated My Entire Apartment for $150 — Full Photo Breakdown
item.description: You don't need a designer budget to have a designer space. Here is how I did it for the price of one night out.

item.title: I Lived on $5 a Day for 30 Days — Here's What I Learned
item.description: I lived on $5 a day for a month. It wasn't about the money : it was about the control.
